## Format

Which format does this example belong to?

- [ ] Tweets / short social
- [ ] Email subject or opener
- [ ] LinkedIn-style post
- [ ] Blog or Substack intro
- [ ] Marketing copy (headline, hero, ad body)
- [ ] About page or bio
- [ ] Internal communication
- [ ] Spanish example
- [ ] Edge case (technical writing, legal, quoted material, other)

## Before

```
[paste the AI-default version]
```

## Diagnosis

What banned words, phrases, or structures does the "Before" contain? Be specific.

## After

```
[paste the rewrite]
```

## Why it works

One-sentence note on the move the rewrite uses.

## Source

If this is from a real draft you have permission to share, mention. If invented, say so.
